text.name: setting_birds_birdSoundVolume_tooltip
text.text: Adjust the volume of bird sounds. Set to 0% to disable sounds.

text.name: setting_birds_maxBirds_tooltip
text.text: Maximum number of birds that can spawn. Each flock will spawn between 50%-100% of this value.

text.name: setting_birds_chanceOfBirds_tooltip
text.text: Probability that birds will appear when working. If birds don't appear, they won't spawn again for 1 hour.

text.name: setting_birds_maxActiveTools_tooltip
text.text: Maximum number of tools that can have bird flocks at the same time. Additional tools beyond this limit will not attract birds.
